repository_basis: The immutable paper names this URL in its code-and-data availability footnote (extracted text line 53).
checkout_method: git clone --filter=blob:none --no-checkout followed by checkout of the pinned commit
paper_relation: The pinned repository commit is dated 2026-06-23, after immutable arXiv v1 was submitted on 2026-05-27, and its subject identifies a Harness-Bench 2.0 update. Repository observations must therefore be reported as later release inspection, not silently treated as the exact paper-time implementation. No repository tags were advertised by git ls-remote at acquisition time.
acquisition_verification: Checked out the pinned commit and archived its complete tracked tree.
Verified the ZIP with unzip -t; no compressed-data errors were reported.
Counted task and grader files from the pinned Git tree rather than README claims.
Sampled README architecture and run-path descriptions and resolved selected files to immutable Git blob IDs.

queue_source_correction.finding: This is a different project: its pinned README describes a ClawBench-derived browser-task matrix, six harness adapters, and placeholder leaderboard values. It does not match the paper's own code-and-data URL or 106 offline filesystem-task implementation.
queue_source_correction.action: The unrelated candidate archive was not retained. The review handoff is corrected to the paper-linked Qihoo360 repository and pinned commit above.

not_claimed: No deep review of the paper or repository was performed during source acquisition.
No benchmark trajectories were rerun and no reported result was independently recomputed.
The post-paper repository commit is not assumed to be byte-identical to the paper-time implementation.
